zh.lifeSummary: 當George Everard於1564年8月20日出生在英國素福爾可霍爾布魯克時，他的父親William Everard28歲，母親Elisabeth Squire25歲。他於1588年5月15日與Mary Pierce在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍爾布魯克結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年1月24日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Everard于1564年8月20日出生在英国素福爾可霍爾布魯克时，他的父亲William Everard28岁，母亲Elisabeth Squire25岁。他于1588年5月15日与Mary Pierce在英国英格兰素福爾可霍爾布魯克结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年1月24日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When George Everard was born on 20 August 1564, in Holbrook, Suffolk, England, his father, William Everard, was 28 and his mother, Elisabeth Squire, was 25. He married Mary Pierce on 15 May 1588, in Holbrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 January 1615, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Everard est né le 20 août 1564, à Holbrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Everard, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Squire, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary Pierce le 15 mai 1588, à Holbrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Everard am 20. August 1564 in Holbrook, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Everard 28 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Squire 25. Er hat am 15. Mai 1588 in Holbrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mary Pierce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Januar 1615 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Everard è nato il il 20 agosto 1564 nel Holbrook, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Everard, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Squire, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mary Pierce il 15 maggio 1588, nel Holbrook, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 gennaio 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Everardが1564年8月20日にイギリススフォルクホールブルークで生まれた時，父William Everardは28歳，母Elisabeth Squireは25歳であった。1588年5月15日にイギリスイギリススフォルクホールブルークでMary Pierceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年1月24日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Everard(이)가 1564년 8월 20일 영국 수폴크 홀브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Everard(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Squire(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1588년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홀브룩에서 Mary Pierce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 1월 24일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mary Pierce em 15 de maio de 1588, em Holbrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Everard родился 20 августа 1564 г. в местности холбрук, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Everard было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Squire, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Pierce 15 мая 1588 г. в местности холбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 января 1615 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Mary Pierce el 15 de mayo de 1588, en Holbrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de enero de 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
